chapter_title.ar: باب الْقِرَاءَةِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ وَ لَيْلَتَهَا فِي الصَّلَوَاتِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 71 – The recitation on the day of Friday and its night in the Salāt

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/363)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/363)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) بِمَا أَقْرَأُ فِي صَلَاةِ الْفَجْرِ فِي يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ فَقَالَ اقْرَأْ فِي الْأُولَى بِسُورَةِ الْجُمُعَةِ وَ فِي الثَّانِيَةِ بِقُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ ثُمَّ اقْنُتْ حَتَّى تَكُونَا سَوَاءً .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Abdullah Bin Aamir, from Ali Bin Mahziyar, from Fazalat Bin Ayoub, from Al Husayn Bin Abu Hamza who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘With what should I recite in Al-Fajr Salāt during the day of Friday?’ So heasws said: ‘Recite in the first (Rak’at) with Surah Al-Jummah (Chapter 62), and in the second (Rak’at) with [112:1] Say He Allah is One (Chapter 112), the perform Qunut until they both happen to be the same’.
en.sarwar: 3. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from ‘Abd Allah ibn ‘Amir from Ali ibn Mahziyar from Fadalah ibn Ayyub from al-Husayn ibn abu Hamzah who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘What can I recite for the morning Salah (prayer) on Friday?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘In the first Rak‘at recite Surah (chapter) al-Jumu‘ah and in the second Rak‘at recite Chapter 112 then read Qunut (supplication after recitation in second Rak‘at) so both become equal.’”
